meaning: 佩斯利螺旋花纹呢[细毛披巾]的
examples: She was wearing wool slacks and a paisley smock.
He was elegantly dressed in a grey suit, blue shirt, and paisley tie.
Ian Paisley announced his retirement as an MP.
Two earlier Scottish by-elections registered swings of 11.3% (Paisley South) and 22.6% (Hamilton South) from Labour to SNP.
Celtic can reduce Rangers' lead to one when they meet St Mirren in Paisley on Sunday.
